response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has 15+ years of broad software engineering experience and demonstrates genuine versatility across web, embedded, and infrastructure domains, with recent foray into AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks. However, the role requires director-level seniority and recognized, demonstrated AI expertise — neither of which the candidate currently meets. His AI exposure is limited to the last year and confined to tooling work rather than product leadership or strategic AI platform development. There is no advanced degree in an AI-related field, no cloud-at-scale credentials, and the GISCollective founder experience, while showing initiative, is a small open-source NGO project rather than entrepreneurial leadership within a larger organization.
strengths: Over 15 years of continuous software engineering experience spanning web, embedded systems, high-performance services, and infrastructure
Founder and active maintainer of GISCollective, demonstrating entrepreneurial drive and ability to ship and sustain a real product
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows at re:cinq
concerns: Current seniority (Senior/Staff) is well below the director-level IC bar the role explicitly requires
AI expertise is nascent and narrow — no demonstrated AI products or platforms with broad market impact or industry recognition
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and cloud depth appears limited to AWS CDK and Kubernetes rather than platform-scale cloud strategy
